name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.ShotShockSpinHelper.BracedSideSpinMult
summary: If shot on a side with a forward foot and both feet are on the ground and balanced, increase the shockspin to compensate for the balancer naturally resisting spin to that side.
remarks:
Default value = 1.0f.
            Min value = 1.0f.
            Max value = 5.0f.
